question: Is the Δ≈0.25 cluster a density excess or a conditioning artifact (EVALUATION W3)?
statistic: P(Δ∈[0.2,0.3] AND R²≥0.9) over all heads; permutation p from shuffled-profile null

protocol.desc: frozen census protocol: L=512, queries i>=L/2, fit [8,256]
original exp-007 protocol: L=256, queries i>=max(32,dx), fit [3,49]

GALA-7B-softmax.protocol: L=512, fit [8,256] (census protocol); 864/1024 heads have stored fits

secondary_local_excess.description: Post-hoc secondary statistic (labeled as such; computed June 10 after seeing the histograms): local density excess among conformal heads (R²≥0.90) — mass in Δ∈[0.20,0.30) vs the two flanking equal-width bins [0.10,0.20)+[0.30,0.40), binomial test against 1/3 share.
